title: quercus microchlamys
intro: Quercus microchlamys, also known as the 'Chinese evergreen oak' or 'Chinese evergreen', is a species of deciduous tree that belongs to the Quercus genus. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Quercus microchlamys include the potential treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic. Quercus microchlamys can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its medicinal effects.
